## Why should this be added?

---

## Does this meet the contribution standards?

- [ ] It is a published book, a specification, or from a recognized engineering organization
- [ ] It is publicly accessible (or is a standard textbook with a full citation)
- [ ] It is relevant to a specific claim, not a general reference
- [ ] It is not a product landing page or vendor tutorial
